dialogos.texto_en: Whoo! There are so many different shops!
The place is bustling with people, isn't it.
Just looking around gets me excited.\nIt seems we could find anything here.\nRight, Nino?
Yeah.
What should we buy for Dad this time?\nWe always buy sweets for him, right?
He's an adult, wouldn't alcohol be good too?\nLook, they're selling Awamori.
Does Dad drink alcohol?\nAt least I've never seen him do so.
Oh, right.\nHmm, I don't see him eating sweets often either.
He's eaten sweets that you've made, Nino,\nso I don't think he dislikes pastries,\nright?
Yeah.
If we buy something he doesn't like, that'd be a shame,\nso let's avoid food and beverages altogether.
In that case...
Ah, how about this paperweight over here?\nIt seems like it could be useful for work.
Wow, it's in the shape of a shisa!\nIt's great because it'll properly watch over Dad's work.
What do you think, Nino?
Oh, yeah, I think it's good.\nIt's not something that would be troublesome to have.
Shall we decide on one out of these then?
Hmm, they come in a set of two, I wonder why?
There's an explanation attached to one of them.\nLet's see...
Ah, shisa come in pairs.\nThe one with an open mouth is male\nand the one with a closed mouth is female.
Is that so?
The male protects the house from outside enemies,\nwhile the female ensures that good luck\ndoesn't leave the house%p-2;――%p; That's what it says.
Wow, they'll protect the house as a team.\nThen we should buy the set.
Hmm...
What is...Dad's favorite color?
I don't know. If he's going to use them at work,\nthey should be of a simple color and not too flashy.
*sigh*
Hey, Nino are you okay?\nYou've been spacing out since we arrived here.
Ah...\nSorry. I was just thinking about something else.
I bet you were thinking about Uesugi-kun, right?
Well, you're not mistaken.
He would have come if you had invited him, right?
Well, I wonder.
Huh?
Ahaha...\nYou asked Uesugi-san what he was going to do,\nbut he went quickly to his room.
Yeah, that's true.\nBut that's probably because he%p-2;――
Well, he doesn't understand the subtleties\nof male-female relationship dynamics, right?
That could be it, but...\nI feel like something was off about his behavior.
He seemed a bit distant since around noon, I guess?
Yeah, now that you mention it.
Yeah, he was definitely weird, right?
Well, he did get a little quieter in the afternoon,\nbut maybe he was just tired?
That might be the case%p-2;――
But, also... I felt like his reactions\nto what Nino was saying\nwere becoming less and less.
Maybe Ichika and Miku were teasing him too much and he\nwanted to avoid her reactions.
We've been together all day since morning,\nbut nothing really happened, right?
I don't remember anything out of the ordinary\nor anything that could cause a problem.
Anything out of the ordinary... Well, I guess\nthe only thing was when Ichika's fans came up\nto talk to her, but that doesn't involve Uesugi-san.
(I first thought something was off\n right after Ichika's fans talked to her.\n But what's the connection?)
(What's wrong, Futaro?\n If there's something you're thinking about,\n you can talk to me about it.)
(Could it be something \n that you can't talk to me about?)
